components.pictogramAmount.helperText.defaultMessage: Inseriu o extreu un pictograma al final de la seqüència. Trobareu més funcions amb el botó dret del ratolí o premeu llargament als mòbils.

components.pictogramAmount.info.description: Toggle view or not more info

components.pictogramSearch.alert.defaultMessage: No s'ha trobat cap pictograma, amb aquesta paraula - Intenta-ho amb una altra paraula!

view.welcome.liveMotive.title.defaultMessage: Crea i imprimeix o visualitza la teva pàgina de seqüències.

news.download-pdf.summary.defaultMessage: You can now download the sequence directly as a PDF file, without opening the print dialog.

news.download-pdf.content.defaultMessage: From the view page, click the new PDF button in the toolbar (next to the print button) to generate and download a PDF of your sequence, ready to share or archive.

news.download-pdf.step1.alt.defaultMessage: View page toolbar with the new PDF button highlighted

news.download-pdf.step1.description.defaultMessage: In the top toolbar of the view page you will find the new PDF button (document icon) next to the orientation and print buttons. Click it to start the download.

news.download-pdf.step2.alt.defaultMessage: Preview of the pictogram sequence that will be downloaded as PDF

news.download-pdf.step2.description.defaultMessage: The PDF contains exactly what you see in the preview: pictograms with the size, spacing and alignment you have set. You can share it by email or save it to your device.

news.new-languages.summary.defaultMessage: The app now speaks five languages. Here's how to change it.

news.new-languages.content.defaultMessage:
SequenciAAC is now available in two new languages: Français (French) and Italiano (Italian). The application can now be used in five languages: Catalan, Spanish, English, French and Italian.

The translations have been done automatically, so there may be some inaccuracies or unnatural expressions. We apologise for any errors and we appreciate you letting us know so we can improve.

news.new-languages.step1.alt.defaultMessage: SequenciAAC navigation menu with the language selector at the bottom

news.new-languages.step1.description.defaultMessage: To change the language, click the SequenciAAC logo to open the navigation menu. At the bottom of the menu you will find the language selector.

news.new-languages.step2.alt.defaultMessage: Language selector expanded with the five available languages

news.new-languages.step2.description.defaultMessage: Click the selector to see the five available languages: Català, Español, English, Français and Italiano. Select one to change the language of the entire application immediately.

news.new-languages.step3.alt.defaultMessage: SequenciAAC application with the interface in Français

news.new-languages.step3.description.defaultMessage: The interface updates instantly. Here you can see the app in Français. If you find any incorrect translation, let us know: we will improve it.

news.multiple-sequences.summary.defaultMessage: You can now create and manage multiple sequences at once with tabs.

news.multiple-sequences.content.defaultMessage: Create as many sequences as you need! Use tabs to add new sequences or remove the ones you no longer need. Each sequence is independent and you can switch between them easily.

news.multiple-sequences.step1.alt.defaultMessage: Sequence 1 with pictograms and button to add a new sequence

news.multiple-sequences.step1.descriptio.defaultMessage: On the edit page, search for words in the search box (separated by commas) and pictograms will appear automatically in the active sequence. Click the + button to create a new sequence.

news.multiple-sequences.step2.alt.defaultMessage: Two sequence tabs visible, sequence 2 active

news.multiple-sequences.step2.descriptio.defaultMessage: Click any tab to switch to a different active sequence. Each sequence has its own independent content. Search for new words to fill sequence 2.

news.multiple-sequences.step3.alt.defaultMessage: View of both sequences with size increased globally

news.multiple-sequences.step3.descriptio.defaultMessage: In the View page, the "Apply to all" toggle lets you adjust the size and spacing of all sequences at once. Move the size control to see the change applied globally.

news.multiple-sequences.step4.alt.defaultMessage: View with sequence 2 individually adjusted to a different size

news.multiple-sequences.step4.descriptio.defaultMessage: Disable "Apply to all" to configure each sequence independently. Expand the accordion for the sequence you want to adjust and change its size or spacing without affecting the others.

news.print-preview.summary.defaultMessage: Preview exactly how your page will look before printing.

news.print-preview.content.defaultMessage: The print preview shows you exactly how the printed page will look. You can control the pictogram size, row and column spacing, and alignment. Everything updates in real time!

news.sequence-settings.summary.defaultMessage: Customize each sequence with alignment, number typography and more options.

news.sequence-settings.content.defaultMessage: You can now customize each sequence independently. Change the pictogram alignment (left, center or right), configure the number typography and color independently from the text, and discover more formatting options to adapt sequences to your needs.

news.save-load.summary.defaultMessage: Download your sequences with images and load them whenever you want.

news.save-load.content.defaultMessage: You'll find the save and load options in the SequenciAAC logo menu. When saving, a file is downloaded with all sequences and pictogram images included. This way you can restore your work at any time!

news.number-font.summary.defaultMessage: Choose an independent font for the numbers shown on pictograms.

news.number-font.content.defaultMessage: You can now configure the font of pictogram numbers independently. In the Default Settings dialog, enabling the Numbering switch reveals a new section to choose the font family, size, and color for the numbers, separately from the pictogram text font.

news.number-font.step1.alt.defaultMessage: Default settings panel with the Numbering switch off

news.number-font.step1.description.defaultMessage: Open the Default Settings dialog from the main menu (click the logo). You will see a switch to enable pictogram numbering.

news.number-font.step2.alt.defaultMessage: Numbering switch enabled in the settings panel

news.number-font.step2.description.defaultMessage: Enable the Numbering switch. Each pictogram will now show its order number on the opposite side of the text.

news.number-font.step3.alt.defaultMessage: New number font section showing family, size and color selectors

news.number-font.step3.description.defaultMessage: Once numbering is enabled, a new section appears to configure the number font: family, size, and color, independently from the pictogram text font.

news.logo-menu.summary.defaultMessage: Click the logo to open the main menu and access all app features.

news.logo-menu.content.defaultMessage: Did you know the SequenciAAC logo is a button? Click it to open the main navigation menu, where you can access all pages and features of the application.

news.logo-menu.step1.alt.defaultMessage: Navigation section of the menu with Home, News, Edit and Preview links

news.logo-menu.step1.description.defaultMessage: The first section contains shortcuts to all pages: Home, News (where you'll find all updates), Edit (to create your sequences) and Preview (to view and print them).

news.logo-menu.step2.alt.defaultMessage: File section of the menu with Download and Load options

news.logo-menu.step2.description.defaultMessage: From here you can manage your sequence files: Download saves the current sequence to a file on your device, and Load retrieves a previously saved sequence.

news.logo-menu.step3.description.defaultMessage: Settings opens the default pictogram settings dialog, where you can adjust typography, borders, text position and other visual options. Below it, the language selector lets you switch between Catalan (ca), Spanish (es), English (en), French (fr) or Italian (it).

news.view-improvements.summary.defaultMessage: Print preview now matches output exactly. New alignment and direction controls.

news.view-improvements.content.defaultMessage: Several bugs have been fixed that caused the print preview to not match the actual printed output. New controls have also been added for alignment and direction of sequences, and when you save a sequence the view settings are now automatically included.

news.view-improvements.step1.alt.defaultMessage: Sequence preview showing exact match with printed output

news.view-improvements.step1.description.defaultMessage: The sequence preview now corresponds exactly to the printed output. A precise scale calculation takes into account the page format (A4, A3) and screen resolution to faithfully show what will be printed.

news.view-improvements.step2.alt.defaultMessage: Alignment and direction controls for sequences

news.view-improvements.step2.description.defaultMessage: New controls to customize each sequence: choose the alignment (left, center, right) and direction (horizontal or vertical) to adapt the presentation to your needs.

news.view-improvements.step3.alt.defaultMessage: Save sequence button with view settings included

news.view-improvements.step3.description.defaultMessage: When you save the sequence using the download button, the view settings (sizes, spacing, alignment and direction) are automatically included in the file, so when you reload it everything will be as you left it.

news.save-improvements.summary.defaultMessage: The saved file now includes custom images and the size and spacing settings for each sequence.

news.save-improvements.content.defaultMessage: The .saac file now saves the custom images you've uploaded, stored directly in the file so they're never lost. Additionally, the display settings for each sequence — pictogram size, spacing and alignment — are also saved and restored exactly as you left them.

news.save-improvements.step1.alt.defaultMessage: Button to upload a custom image to the pictogram

news.save-improvements.step1.description.defaultMessage: Upload your own image to any pictogram. The image is saved directly in the .saac file, without needing internet.

news.save-improvements.step2.alt.defaultMessage: Save dialog with sequence and settings options

news.save-improvements.step2.description.defaultMessage: When saving the file, all custom images are automatically included.

news.save-improvements.step3.description.defaultMessage: The size, spacing and alignment of each sequence are automatically saved and restored when loading the file.

pages.viewSequence.tooltip.downloadPdf.description: Tooltip del botó de descàrrega de PDF
